topic: v1.0.3 stress test results deep research: live-handler gap + harness telemetry export gap + W4 trigger distribution + through-line v1.0.1→v1.0.2→v1.0.3 + expansion candidates
researchQuestions: RQ1: What does v1.0.3 telemetry actually prove vs leave unproven? (12-row sample size implications, packet-local runner vs live handler distinction)
RQ2: Live handler embed-readiness gate analysis — origin, smallest fix, deterministic test seam recommendation
RQ3: Harness-vs-handler envelope parity gap — smallest change so harness natively emits SearchDecisionEnvelope/audit/shadow
RQ4: W4 trigger distribution analysis — query-population skew, 100% trigger rate implications, gating-policy tuning candidates
RQ5: Through-line v1.0.1 → v1.0.2 → v1.0.3 — what each cycle proved/disproved/leaves-open
RQ6: Expansion candidates ranked by leverage × feasibility revealed by v1.0.3 telemetry
